overlaps_with: WeKnora Auto Wiki, generic knowledge graph, and generic RAG trace
MMSkills multimodal Skill package and preview schema
existing knowledge package source trace and evidence map
dedup_decision.weknora_boundary: WeKnora remains the local Auto Wiki, generic knowledge graph, and generic RAG trace capability.
dedup_decision.mmskills_boundary: MMSkills remains the multimodal Skill package, visual state card, and keyframe preview contract.
dedup_decision.campaign_3_0_boundary: External URL ingestion, video/source memory, visual evidence extraction, OpenCLI verification, and external-source correctness checks remain planned_not_active Campaign 3 Supplement 3.0 work.

why_reference_only: The official repository identity, current HEAD, latest release, license, dependency shape, and documented multimodal scope were verified.
The distinct local value is limited to original schema, trace, relation, and benchmark contracts after checking overlap with existing HeiTang capabilities.
No RAG-Anything, LightRAG, MinerU, model, provider, embedding, vector database, or retrieval runtime was installed or executed.
No real runtime quality score, multimodal query, or executable UI action exists.
The correct decision is reference_only rather than real_integration, needs_strengthening, or stop_integration.
boundaries: reference_only means verified source metadata plus local original schema and benchmark contracts only.
The current RAG main chain is not replaced.
Campaign 3 Supplement 3.0 external-source ingestion, OpenCLI verification, video ingestion, and correctness verification remain not active.
UI may display source, license, schema, benchmark, and reference-only state; it must not expose Run or ready state.
remaining_gap: Section 5 items 5.13-5.14, strengthening items 5.S1-5.S3, Campaign 3 Supplement 2.0 closure, Campaign 3.0, Campaign 3 Supplement 4.0, expanded final consistency, Campaign 4-8, and release remain incomplete.
